task_completion.description: The Chinook database is open in a database management GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A database application window (such as LibreOffice Base) is visible, showing the Chinook database loaded.

task_completion.description: The form is based on the Customer table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form wizard shows the 'Customer' table selected, or the finished form displays actual customer data (e.g., customer names) from the database.

task_completion.description: The form includes the FirstName, LastName, Email, Company, and Phone fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form contains input controls specifically labeled FirstName, LastName, Email, Company, and Phone.

task_completion.description: The form uses a single-column layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields in the form are arranged vertically in a single column, with only one input field per row.

task_completion.description: The form is named 'Customer Entry Form'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the open form window reads 'Customer Entry Form', or it is listed as 'Customer Entry Form' in the Forms section of the main database window.

integrity.description: The agent used the database GUI to create the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a database GUI (like LibreOffice Base), not terminal commands or scripts generating the form.

integrity.description: The form is a genuine database form linked to the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: The form includes standard database form elements like record navigation controls at the bottom, rather than being a static drawing or text document.

integrity.description: The agent didn't just type the field names into a text editor or spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application used is a database manager, and the output is an actual form object, not a text file or spreadsheet mockup.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Chinook database contains exactly 59 customers. If the created form displays record navigation controls, it should indicate 59 total records.
